items.headline: Expert Warning: America’s Grid Is So Far Behind, Blackouts Are Coming Even Without AI
items.summary: Dan Dreyfus, founder of Borneite Capital, warned on the All-In Podcast that America’s grid is in such poor shape that blackouts, when power is completely lost, and brownouts, when voltage is reduced, and electricity becomes less reliable, are coming from ordinary electrification alone.
